SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN DDS, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELAS, JENNIFER $677.50 PRINCIPAL, $51.56 INTEREST, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $874.06, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CAROL VELAS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VELAS, JENNIFER VELAS, CAROL
